sql.quarterly_issuance_by_type: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', c.issued)::date AS issued_quarter, c.type AS card_type, COUNT(c.card_id) AS issued_cards FROM card c WHERE c.issued >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND c.issued < DATE '1999-01-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;
sql.issuance_to_first_withdrawal_funnel: WITH first_card_tx AS (SELECT c.card_id, MIN(t.date) AS first_card_tx_date FROM card c JOIN disp dp ON dp.disp_id = c.disp_id LEFT JOIN trans t ON t.account_id = dp.account_id AND t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' GROUP BY c.card_id) SELECT 'issued_cards' AS stage, COUNT(c.card_id) AS clients_or_cards FROM card c WHERE c.issued >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND c.issued < DATE '1999-01-01' UNION ALL SELECT 'first_card_withdrawal' AS stage, COUNT(card_id) FROM first_card_tx WHERE first_card_tx_date IS NOT NULL;
sql.avg_days_to_first_card_tx: WITH first_card_tx AS (SELECT c.card_id, c.issued, MIN(t.date) AS first_card_tx_date FROM card c JOIN disp dp ON dp.disp_id = c.disp_id LEFT JOIN trans t ON t.account_id = dp.account_id AND t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' GROUP BY c.card_id, c.issued) SELECT AVG(first_card_tx_date - issued) AS avg_days_to_first_card_transaction FROM first_card_tx WHERE first_card_tx_date IS NOT NULL;

chart_spec.layout_intent: acquisition trend, conversion funnel, and latency KPI
